function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { x0.re + x1.re = (x0 + x1).re }(w1, w2)
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { x0.im + x1.im = (x0 + x1).im }(w1, w2)

goal: complex_converges_to(complex_add_seq(a, b), w1 + w2) = (converges_to(re_seq(complex_add_seq(a, b)), (w1 + w2).re) and converges_to(im_seq(complex_add_seq(a, b)), (w1 + w2).im))
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Complex, x1: Complex) { (converges_to(re_seq(x0), x1.re) and converges_to(im_seq(x0), x1.im)) = complex_converges_to(x0, x1) }(complex_add_seq(a, b), w1 + w2)
function(x0: Nat -> Complex) { exists(k0: Complex) { complex_converges_to(x0, k0) } = complex_converges(x0) }(a)
function(x0: Nat -> Complex) { exists(k0: Complex) { complex_converges_to(x0, k0) } = complex_converges(x0) }(b)
complex_converges_to(complex_add_seq(a, b), w1 + w2)
function(x0: Complex) { not complex_converges_to(complex_add_seq(a, b), x0) }(w1 + w2)
function(x0: Nat -> Complex) { exists(k0: Complex) { complex_converges_to(x0, k0) } = complex_converges(x0) }(complex_add_seq(a, b))
complex_converges(b)
complex_converges(a)
exists(k0: Complex) { complex_converges_to(complex_add_seq(a, b), k0) }
not exists(k1: Complex) { complex_converges_to(complex_add_seq(a, b), k1) }
